subcodes.first_line: Unto God belongeth the dominion of the heavens and the earth. Say: All names are My names, and whatsoever hath been created is My testimony. Blessed be [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لله ملکوت ملک السموات و الارضین قل کل الاسماء اسمی و ما خلق برهانی طوبی
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @consolation and comfort, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @chastisement and requital
